diagnosis_probe_run.rejudge_skipped_reason: probe evidence was contextual, not contrastive

conclusion.claim: Dependency resolver prioritizes browser over node

contract_invariants: Node conditional-export resolution walks the caller's declared condition order and then the default branch, recursively resolving the selected target. It must not choose object insertion order, infer a condition from filenames, or return the condition key instead of its target.

An ESM import built from a filesystem path uses the platform path-to-file-URL primitive so fragment, percent, space, drive, and separator characters are encoded exactly once. Manual file:// assembly, whole-path encodeURIComponent, and changing the filesystem path are not equivalent.
